ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "waist" REAL /* Measurement for the waist in the specified unit */,
  "chest" REAL /* Measurement for the chest in the specified unit */,
  "oversize_chest" REAL /* Measurement for the oversize chest in the specified unit */,
  "arm_length" REAL /* Measurement for the arm length in the specified unit */,
  "leg_length" REAL /* Measurement for the leg length in the specified unit */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., CM, IN) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID for the clothing type */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Style ID for the clothing style */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand ID for the specific brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the size was added */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the size was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the brand was added */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the brand was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in the preferred unit */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in the preferred unit */,
  "preferred_unit" TEXT /* Preferred unit of measurement (e.g., CM, IN) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "date_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose measurements are recorded */,
  "waist" REAL /* Measurement for the waist in the specified unit */,
  "chest" REAL /* Measurement for the chest in the specified unit */,
  "oversize_chest" REAL /* Measurement for the oversize chest in the specified unit */,
  "arm_length" REAL /* Measurement for the arm length in the specified unit */,
  "leg_length" REAL /* Measurement for the leg length in the specified unit */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., CM, IN) */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "neck" REAL /* Measurement for the neck in the specified unit */,
  "hips" REAL /* Measurement for the hips in the specified unit */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Measurement for the shoulder width in the specified unit */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Measurement for the inseam in the specified unit */,
  "bust" REAL /* Measurement for the bust in the specified unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement record is active */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the measurement record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand for which the recommendation is made */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID for the clothing type */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Style ID for the clothing style */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user accepted the recommendation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recommendation is active */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
